response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the song 'Kinmokusei' via the on-screen text at 03:42. 2. Identified the creator as 'Atsu Mizuno' (water_a) from online search results for 'Kinmokusei'. 3. Used the search query '金木犀 水野あつ 歌詞 英語翻訳' to find both the Japanese lyrics and English translations. 4. Segmented the video into an intro, the song's start, and the character's performance, ensuring the song metadata was attached to the musical segments.
response.global_summary: This video is a cover performance of the song 'Kinmokusei' by a character associated with 'FBKINGDOM', featuring a brief intro and a character singing in a stylized, atmospheric environment.

scenes.description: The song 'Kinmokusei' plays with atmospheric imagery and on-screen Japanese lyrics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
僕の居る意味はどこにあるの？
誰かに必要とされたかった
夢や希望も捨てきれないけど
なんとなく今を生きている

どれだけ叫んでも
この声は君には届かない
どれだけ歌っても
この声は君には届かない

誰も幸せにできないの
都合良いね、涙が出るの

金木犀の匂いがした
明日のことも忘れたくなった
いっそ逃げてしまおうかな
僕は悲劇の主人公だ

やさしいヒトで居たいな
でもそんな思いも偽善だ
誰も幸せにできないの
都合良いね、涙が出るの
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Where can I find the meaning of my existence?
I wanted to be needed by someone
I can't completely throw away my dreams and hopes
Yet I am just living my life day by day

No matter how much I scream
This voice won't reach you
No matter how much I sing
This voice won't reach you

I can't make anyone happy
It's convenient, isn't it? Tears come out

I catch the scent of osmanthus
I didn't want to forget about tomorrow either
I'll quietly run away
I am the protagonist of this tragedy

I want to stay as a kind person
But even that thought is hypocritical
I can't make anyone happy
It's convenient, isn't it? Tears come out

scenes.description: A character appears on-screen and performs the song 'Kinmokusei' against a dark, floral backdrop.
